## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass (`make test` / `npm test`)
- [ ] Linting passes (`make lint` / `npm run lint`)
- [ ] Type-check passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Code is formatted (`make format` / `npm run format`)
- [ ] Database migrations added if schema changed
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
